name: Skill points allocate and reset from the Skills tab
description: Skill points come from wizard level-ups, which come from combat kills (a fresh save starts with 0 points). The SKILLS tab button shows a red badge with the unspent point count once a point is earned.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Click SUMMON twice so equipped books fight automatically
Wait until the SKILLS tab button shows a red number badge (a skill point was earned from combat kills). This can take up to 2 minutes; check every 15 seconds without clicking anything
Verify four skills are listed and the skill point counter shows at least 1
Click the plus/allocate button on the first skill once
Verify the first skill's point count increased by one and the unspent skill point counter decreased by one
Verify the first skill's point count returned to 0 and the unspent counter returned to its pre-allocation value
